bead.title: config: NoProgressCooldown / MaxNoChangesBeforeClose / HeartbeatInterval resolvers on WorkersConfig
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Adds three new fields to WorkersConfig with sensible defaults matching today's hardcoded constants (6h, 3, bead.HeartbeatInterval). Adds resolver methods. The loop does not read them yet — that wires up in beads 6/7.

Defaults: NoProgressCooldown=6h, MaxNoChangesBeforeClose=3, HeartbeatInterval=15s (or whatever bead.HeartbeatInterval currently is — preserve existing value).

In-scope:
- cli/internal/config/types.go (extend WorkersConfig)
- cli/internal/config/types_test.go (or new file) for resolver tests

Out-of-scope:
- ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime / RunWithConfig migration (bead 6+)

See TD-024 §*Config extensions §WorkersConfig.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run TestWorkersConfigResolvers ./internal/config/... passes for each of the three new resolvers (default + override). cd cli && go test ./... passes (no regression). git diff cli/internal/config/types.go shows three new fields added to WorkersConfig with yaml/json tags.
